tools.name: image_info
tools.description: Read just enough of an image file to report format, dimensions, color depth, and byte size — no pixel decoding. Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF87a/89a, WebP (VP8/VP8L/VP8X), and BMP. Path is relative to the plugin's workdir (pass --workdir=$PWD on the CLI). Returns format="unknown" if no magic bytes match.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Path to the image, relative to workdir."}},"required":["path"]}
